commentaries.author: Ambrosiaster
commentaries.content: This is why Paul worked so hard for the conversion of the Jews, since the handicap of their blindness will be removed at the time when their sin is paid for, so that they might receive the free exercise of their will. Commentary on Paul’s Epistles.

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: This also condemns the Jews, because although others gained from their sins, they did not profit from the good works of others.
